OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Drop Items at Player Location if Inventory is Full
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Drop Items at Player Location if Inventory is Full

OptionDescription.SourceString: Whether or not to drop the item at the player location rather than placing it in the inventory if the player's inventory was full.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Whether or not to drop the item at the player location rather than placing it in the inventory if the player's inventory was full.
